prompts: What is the gender pay gap in São Paulo?
Help me with analysis ideas using SAEB data
How many active companies are there in Serra da Saudade (MG)?
Who received the most votes for president in the Itaquera neighborhood in 2022?

presentation.title: How does our product work?
presentation.description: Discover the AI tool that helps you create analyses in seconds and guides you through the entire Data Basis public datalake

why.title: Why will the Data Basis Chatbot revolutionize the way you work with data?

items.title: Access to Brazil's Largest Public Datalake
items.content: Browse terabytes of data across more than 740 tables on diverse topics (education, economy, health, labor market, demography, environment).

items.title: Advanced AI Engine with Unlimited Questions
items.content: Powered by Gemini, Google's state-of-the-art AI model, to turn as many questions as you want into precise queries.

items.title: Natural Language Interface
items.content: Lets anyone explore the Data Basis public datalake through simple questions, with no programming required.

items.title: Transparency and Flexibility
items.content: Including the SQL query lets you validate insights and download data to build your own visualizations and reports in other tools.

pricingCard.title: Try it free and create analyses in seconds with the power of AI

banner.title: Create analyses in seconds with the power of AI and Base dos Dados' Datalake
